summary.shape_sentence: Early upside expansion into a sharp morning peak, then full reversal into midday liquidation, followed by a weak late-day base that never repaired the damage.

goat.note: Opening upside expansion broke through early supply and printed the session high near 25,392.

red_circles.behavior: They clustered after the morning peak and on later rebound failures, marking continuation shorts within the bearish reversal.

green_circles.behavior: They worked best in the opening push and on the first bounce from the midday low; later signals were mostly rotational and weaker.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Early supply around 25,300-25,390 was broken during the morning squeeze, but afternoon supply near 25,220-25,260 was respected and capped rebounds.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 25,100-25,160 repeatedly attracted support and prevented a close at the lows, while higher demand shelves gave way during the midday flush.

time_markers.10am_blue: Strong upside expansion through early supply, transitioning into the GOAT push toward the session high.
time_markers.12pm_red: Bearish reversal was underway and price was pressing lower toward the lunch-session sell climax.
time_markers.2pm_green: A rebound was fading under supply; price was rotating rather than reclaiming trend control.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Session ended in a weak lower-half base, above the low but without a strong late recovery.

takeaway: Bearish reversal day with an early breakout squeeze that failed, followed by midday liquidation and only a partial late-day stabilization.
